Speed Garage.label: Speed Garage
Speed Garage.description: Primarily British style that paved the way for UK Garage, combining cut-up vocal samples and sped up four-on-the-floor Garage House rhythms with Jungle-esque basslines.

British Trad Jazz.label: British Trad Jazz
British Trad Jazz.description: Popular mid-1950s to early '60s revival of Dixieland; pushed out commercially by Beat music in 1963.

Scene.label: Scene
Scene.description: Youth subculture popularized in the 2000s via MySpace, spanning Metalcore, Pop Punk, Post-Hardcore, and related genres; associated with androgynous hairstyles, mall-sourced fashion, the Warped Tour festival circuit, and varied crossover with Electronic music.

about music.label: About Music
about music.description: Music featuring lyrical themes about music itself. Themes can include, but are not limited to, listening to music, showing appreciation for music, tributes to other musicians, the act of making and performing music, or being a musician in general.

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.description: Cryptic lyricism on a range of subjects, often using allegory and metaphor.

acoustic.label: Acoustic
acoustic.description: Played without the use of any electric instruments.

adolescence.label: Adolescence
adolescence.description: About the period between childhood and adulthood.

afterlife.label: Afterlife
afterlife.description: Continuation of a conscious existence after death.

ageing.label: Ageing
ageing.description: Maturation, rites of passage, and the joys or regrets that come with getting older.

alcohol.label: Alcohol
alcohol.description: Ranges from party anthems to sombre reflection.

alienation.label: Alienation
alienation.description: Being alienated from one's environment, society, or self.

aliens.label: Aliens
aliens.description: Beings originating from worlds beyond Earth.

altruistic.label: Altruistic
altruistic.description: Expresses love for humanity, promoting values such as generosity and benevolence.

anarchism.label: Anarchism
anarchism.description: Advocating self-governing societies and voluntary institutions.

androgynous vocals.label: Androgynous Vocals
androgynous vocals.description: Sung or spoken in an ambiguous or androgynous manner.

angular.label: Angular
angular.description: Sharp, jagged sound created by large, irregular interval jumps and sudden shifts in melodic direction.

animals.label: Animals
animals.description: Includes specific pets, animal rights activism, and fauna in general.

anthemic.label: Anthemic
anthemic.description: Memorable and repetitive, often powerfully delivered with call-and-response lyrics.

anti-authoritarian.label: Anti-Authoritarian
anti-authoritarian.description: Opposes political systems that concentrate power in leaders who are unresponsive to the public, reject political plurality, and limit civil liberties.

anti-religious.label: Anti-Religious
anti-religious.description: Opposition to religious beliefs, practices and institutions.

anticolonialism.label: Anticolonialism
anticolonialism.description: Resistance to the colonial domination of a people by an occupying power.

antidiscrimination.label: Antidiscrimination
antidiscrimination.description: Opposes prejudicial distinctions between groups of people.

apathetic.label: Apathetic
apathetic.description: Showing very little emotion; disinterest, boredom, or indifference.

apocalyptic.label: Apocalyptic
apocalyptic.description: End of the world or catastrophic destruction.

apology.label: Apology
apology.description: Confessing to wrongdoing, atoning for one's actions, and seeking forgiveness and reconciliation.

aquatic.label: Aquatic
aquatic.description: Water landscapes or oceans through ambient or atmospheric effect, and/or the use of field recordings.

association football.label: Association Football
association football.description: Players score points by shooting a ball into opposing team's goal while primarily using their feet.

atmospheric.label: Atmospheric
atmospheric.description: Puts special emphasis on the timbre and texture of the music.

avant-garde.label: Avant-Garde
avant-garde.description: New and experimental ideas and methods that challenge audiences and orthodox culture.

ballad.label: Ballad
ballad.description: Slow and usually sentimental love songs.

beach.label: Beach
beach.description: Evokes imagery of activities such as swimming and surfing or landscape features like crashing waves and rolling sand dunes.

betrayal.label: Betrayal
betrayal.description: Breaking of trust or loyalty between two or more parties.

biblical.label: Biblical
biblical.description: Centered on the themes and stories contained in the Bible.

birthday.label: Birthday
birthday.description: The anniversary of a person’s birth and the celebrations thereof.

bisexual.label: Bisexual
bisexual.description: Exploration of bisexuality, covering bisexual relationships, attractions, and sociopolitical issues.

bittersweet.label: Bittersweet
bittersweet.description: A mixture of sadness and happiness.

bouncy.label: Bouncy
bouncy.description: Upbeat back-and-forth rhythms with strong downbeats.

breakup.label: Breakup
breakup.description: Lost love, divorce, and other forms of separation within a romantic setting.

bright.label: Bright
bright.description: Evokes imagery full of light or liveliness; typically has a clear, sharp, treble-forward sound and is written in the major scale.

buzzy.label: Buzzy
buzzy.description: Making a continuous low, vibrating sound, similar to that of a bee.

call and response.label: Call and Response
call and response.description: Compositional technique involving two musical phrases, one a 'call' and another as a 'response' to the call.

callback.label: Callback
callback.description: References one's own previously released work.

calm.label: Calm
calm.description: Free of worry, anger, or passion.

cannabis.label: Cannabis
cannabis.description: Use of the psychoactive drug derived from the cannabis plant in its various forms as well as culture and activity surrounding it.

cars.label: Cars
cars.description: Typically four-wheel automotive transportation for passengers.

childhood.label: Childhood
childhood.description: Themed around children or the experience of being a child.

Christian.label: Christian
Christian.description: Incorporates elements from the teachings and texts of the Christian faith.

cold.label: Cold
cold.description: Sensations of low temperatures or lack of physical warmth, such as bitter weather, freezing environments, or other such landscapes.

comics.label: Comics
comics.description: Themes, characters, or events from or inspired by comics, often blending narrative elements with visual storytelling.

community.label: Community
community.description: Groups of people sharing common characteristics or interests.

compassionate.label: Compassionate
compassionate.description: Lyrics expressing care and empathy, using positive and supportive language.

complex.label: Complex
complex.description: Elements that are interconnected in complicated ways, utilizing various changes in any of its aspects, in particular tempo, rhythm, melody, dynamics, and structure.

conscious.label: Conscious
conscious.description: How political, cultural, economical, religious, and other social factors influence the lives of people within a society.

courage.label: Courage
courage.description: Willingness to confront pain, danger, or uncertainty.

cover.label: Cover
cover.description: A new performance of an existing song, typically by a different artist.

cozy.label: Cozy
cozy.description: Comfortable and intimate; typically warm and soft.

crime.label: Crime
crime.description: Subjects within criminal law, including violence and murder, stealing, rioting, drugs, etc.

crooning.label: Crooning
crooning.description: Crooning is a smooth, intimate vocal style that arose in 1920s Jazz and Traditional Pop as improved microphones allowed singers to explore greater dynamic ranges. This style was most popular from the 1940s to the late 1960s, with Bing Crosby and Frank Sinatra being some of the most well-known crooners.

cynical.label: Cynical
cynical.description: Expresses distrust towards people and their motives.

dancing.label: Dancing
dancing.description: Features lyrical themes about moving rhythmically to music, sometimes with choreographed or improvised steps and gestures.

dark humor.label: Dark Humor
dark humor.description: Uses comedy to reflect a sense of humor towards the relevant subject matter.

daytime.label: Daytime
daytime.description: Imagery of the time between sunrise and sunset.

deadpan.label: Deadpan
deadpan.description: Dry, expressionless, and in a matter-of-fact fashion; can also be used comedically.

death.label: Death
death.description: Includes the loss of a friend, family member, or loved one, fears of one's own death, or suicide.

dense.label: Dense
dense.description: Intensive, busy, thick, and often multi-layered sound.

diss.label: Diss
diss.description: Verbally attacks another person or people.

disturbing.label: Disturbing
disturbing.description: Causing feelings of uneasiness and anxiety.

domestic.label: Domestic
domestic.description: Home environment, daily household activities, domestic intimacy, and related descriptions.

dreams.label: Dreams
dreams.description: Thoughts, images, and emotions that one experiences during sleep.

drugs.label: Drugs
drugs.description: Acquisition and/or consumption of legal and illegal drugs, ranging from alcohol, to the more common usage of marijuana, to harder illegal drugs such as heroin, often psychedelic.

duet.label: Duet
duet.description: Two focal singers or instrumentalists playing distinct but complementary parts.

dystopian.label: Dystopian
dystopian.description: Bleak, often fictional society under totalitarian control.

eclectic.label: Eclectic
eclectic.description: Different techniques, styles, aesthetics, instrumentation, and genres through the duration of a song or entire release.

entertainment industry.label: Entertainment Industry
entertainment industry.description: Experiences and reflections on how the entertainment industry works.

environmentalism.label: Environmentalism
environmentalism.description: Advocates for the protection and preservation of the natural environment.

envy.label: Envy
envy.description: Jealousy towards certain aspects of someone else's life, and the resentment that comes from not being in the same position.

epic.label: Epic
epic.description: Grand in scale, reminiscent of longform narrative poetry recounting the extraordinary lives and acts of deities and heroes.

escapism.label: Escapism
escapism.description: Distracting oneself from unpleasant emotions, mundanity, or harsh realities.

evening.label: Evening
evening.description: End of the day, sunset, or dusk.

everyday life.label: Everyday Life
everyday life.description: Day-to-day activities and the mundane, relative to the narrator's culture.

existential.label: Existential
existential.description: Can range from the thought-provoking and often introspective deconstruction of one's own existence, to mental breakdown and existential crisis.

failure.label: Failure
failure.description: Being unable to reach an intended goal.

falsetto.label: Falsetto
falsetto.description: Singing higher than modal voice (the typical register in speech and singing).

fame.label: Fame
fame.description: Being famous and its effect on people.

family.label: Family
family.description: Family members, familial relationships, and topics surrounding the family.

fans.label: Fans
fans.description: Enthusiastic devotees of someone or something.

fantasy.label: Fantasy
fantasy.description: Generally fictional narratives set in a fantastical, imaginary universe, often including elements of magic, mythical beings, sword and sorcery, etc.

fashion.label: Fashion
fashion.description: Forms of dress and visual aesthetics that characterize certain social groups or periods of time.

female vocalist.label: Female Vocalist
female vocalist.description: Sung or spoken by female vocalists.

feminism.label: Feminism
feminism.description: Incorporates feminist themes and talking points, analyzing issues such as gender oppression, the patriarchy, and women's rights.

fitness.label: Fitness
fitness.description: Lyrics focused on physical health, exercise, and an active, healthy lifestyle.

flirting.label: Flirting
flirting.description: Displaying playful or serious intent to seek out romantic or sexual relationships.

flowers.label: Flowers
flowers.description: Often colorful, scented variety of plant that form blooms and produce seeds.

folklore.label: Folklore
folklore.description: Stories messages and/or themes taken from traditional folk literature, poetry, music, art, and/or customs.

food.label: Food
food.description: Preparing meals, eating and drinking, and other thematic content about nutritious substances.

forest.label: Forest
forest.description: Forests, including the animal and natural life contained within.

friendship.label: Friendship
friendship.description: Relationships between friends and the celebration of friendship and platonic love.

funereal.label: Funereal
funereal.description: Imagery of mourning and sorrow, often paired with a sombre mood.

futuristic.label: Futuristic
futuristic.description: Imagery of a time yet to come, especially advanced technology and other elements of science fiction.

fuzzy.label: Fuzzy
fuzzy.description: Distorted, heavily saturated sound with a long-lasting sustain and an occasionally lo-fi sound.

gallop.label: Gallop
gallop.description: Rhythm created by playing an eighth note followed by two sixteenth notes.

gang vocals.label: Gang Vocals
gang vocals.description: Sung, spoken, or usually shouted by multiple people at once in a raw and unpolished manner.

gay.label: Gay
gay.description: Exploration of same-gender attraction in men, including their relationships, experiences, and associated sociopolitical movements.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Exploration of gender, including gender identity, gender expression, gender expectations, and gender stereotypes.

ghosts.label: Ghosts
ghosts.description: Spirits of the dead appearing in this world.

greed.label: Greed
greed.description: Insatiable desire for material gain, particularly money and wealth, as well as to accrue status and power.

grief.label: Grief
grief.description: Coping with loss, particularly with the death of a loved one.

guns.label: Guns
guns.description: Typically lightweight, portable firearms used as weapons.

halloween.label: Halloween
halloween.description: Traditions of the yearly holiday, such as trick-or-treating, being scary, carving pumpkins, and dressing up; these songs are often playful and silly.

harsh vocals.label: Harsh Vocals
harsh vocals.description: Range of extreme vocal techniques characterized by growls, screams and other dissonant vocalizations.

hateful.label: Hateful
hateful.description: Reflects the singer's hatred or disdain towards the relevant subject matter.

hazy.label: Hazy
hazy.description: Evokes real or imagined environments obscured by atmospheric coverings such as fog, dust, or smoke, commonly evoking blurry and surreal-like imagery.

heavy.label: Heavy
heavy.description: Techniques such as distorted and downtuned riffs, forceful rhythm section, loud low frequencies, and abrasive and aggressive performance used to create a powerful and pounding sound.

hedonism.label: Hedonism
hedonism.description: Pursuit of pleasure and self-gratification; sensually self-indulgent.

Hindu.label: Hindu
Hindu.description: Incorporates elements from the teachings and texts of the Hindu faith..

history.label: History
history.description: Notable past events, people, places, and things.

homicide.label: Homicide
homicide.description: Taking another's life or intending to do so.

horror.label: Horror
horror.description: Fictional stories that focus on creating fear, shock, and/or repulsion.

humorous.label: Humorous
humorous.description: Uses comedy to reflect a sense of humor towards the relevant subject matter.

hypnotic.label: Hypnotic
hypnotic.description: References or emulates higher response toward suggestions and a decrease in general awareness; often repetitive in nature.

individuality.label: Individuality
individuality.description: Recognition of one's identity and the things that distinguish oneself from others.

infidelity.label: Infidelity
infidelity.description: Unfaithfulness to a romantic or sexual partner.

injury.label: Injury
injury.description: Damage to the tissue of a living being.

instrumental.label: Instrumental
instrumental.description: Contains no vocals or lyrics, although some instrumental compositions occasionally utilize sampling which contains speech, or can include Spoken Word.

introspective.label: Introspective
introspective.description: Analysis of one's own thoughts and feelings, or a form of interior monologue.

leisure.label: Leisure
leisure.description: Spending free time on enjoyable or relaxing activities.

lesbian.label: Lesbian
lesbian.description: Exploration of lesbianism, including women's attraction to other women and their related experiences, as well as connected sociopolitical movements.

LGBTQ.label: LGBTQ
LGBTQ.description: People and events within the LGBTQ+ community, topics surrounding their sexuality and/or gender identity, or sociopolitical commentary and introspection on those subjects.

literature.label: Literature
literature.description: Written works or authors, as well as the act of reading and writing literary works.

lonely.label: Lonely
lonely.description: Characterized by a feeling of isolation or lack of companionship.

longing.label: Longing
longing.description: Desire, often for what is unattainable.

love.label: Love
love.description: Romance and falling in love as well as heartbreak and breakup.

loyalty.label: Loyalty
loyalty.description: Firm and unchanging commitment to a person, group or cause.

lush.label: Lush
lush.description: Techniques such as rich textures, layered instrumentation, extended chords, string arrangements, and clean production utilized to create a tender, evocative, and colorful sound.

lyrical dissonance.label: Lyrical Dissonance
lyrical dissonance.description: Mismatch between the emotions expressed by the lyrics and the instrumental of a song.

macabre.label: Macabre
macabre.description: Abnormal interest in disturbing and unpleasant subjects such as death, usually incorporating graphic imagery.

male vocalist.label: Male Vocalist
male vocalist.description: Sung or spoken by male vocalists.

manhood.label: Manhood
manhood.description: Men's experiences of their gender identity and/or sex.

maritime.label: Maritime
maritime.description: Navigation and commerce on or bordering a sea as well as traveling over a sea.

marriage.label: Marriage
marriage.description: The culturally and legally recognized union of people as spouses.

martial.label: Martial
martial.description: Armed forces, wars and military bands.

mathematics.label: Mathematics
mathematics.description: The study of numbers, operations and objects using logic-based reasoning.

maximalist.label: Maximalist
maximalist.description: Layered, grand, and heterogeneous, embracing the excessive use of musical elements with elaborate song structures and diverse instrumentation.

medley.label: Medley
medley.description: Combines two or more different pieces played in succession.

melodic.label: Melodic
melodic.description: Strong emphasis on melody compared with other aspects of composition such as rhythm, harmony, or texture.

menacing.label: Menacing
menacing.description: Lyrics conveying a sense of imminent danger and intent to harm.

mental health.label: Mental Health
mental health.description: Reflections on one's psychological wellness and its maintenance.

minimalistic.label: Minimalistic
minimalistic.description: Stripped-down, keeping only essential sounds and predominantly using conventional song structures, and narrow instrumentation.

mining.label: Mining
mining.description: Extracting valuable resources from the surface of the Earth.

misanthropic.label: Misanthropic
misanthropic.description: Antisocial tendency, or the dislike of other people.

money.label: Money
money.description: Currency or other mediums of economic exchange.

monologue.label: Monologue
monologue.description: Spoken pieces presented by a single person, or more often, character.

mountains.label: Mountains
mountains.description: Evokes imagery of cliffs, crags, peaks, ranges, and high-altitude terrain.

mysterious.label: Mysterious
mysterious.description: Conveys that there is something that the listener should know or understand, but which eludes them.

mythology.label: Mythology
mythology.description: Traditional tales from a particular culture or religion.

narrative.label: Narrative
narrative.description: Lyrics containing a story developed through a series of related events.

nationalism.label: Nationalism
nationalism.description: Political ideology which showcases a complex and communal identification and pride in one's nation, as well as a desire to preserve said nation's culture.

nature.label: Nature
nature.description: Evokes imagery of the natural world, including landscapes, plants, and animals.

nightlife.label: Nightlife
nightlife.description: Entertainment available at nighttime, usually in urban areas.

nihilistic.label: Nihilistic
nihilistic.description: Belief that norms (social, moral, or otherwise) possess no necessity beyond their functional, instrumental use by particular institutions (state, church, etc.).

noisy.label: Noisy
noisy.description: Strong emphasis on distorted timbres and textures.

nonbinary vocalist.label: Nonbinary Vocalist
nonbinary vocalist.description: Sung or spoken by nonbinary vocalists.

nonlexical vocables.label: Nonlexical Vocables
nonlexical vocables.description: Variety of spoken and sung vocal sounds with no lexical meaning.

nostalgia.label: Nostalgia
nostalgia.description: Longing for a period in the past.

novelty.label: Novelty
novelty.description: Created with the intent of being humorous or otherwise zany.

obsession.label: Obsession
obsession.description: Intense focus on a person, idea, or activity.

ominous.label: Ominous
ominous.description: Evokes a sense that something evil, unfortunate, or unpleasant will happen.

optimistic.label: Optimistic
optimistic.description: Reflects the singer's positive feelings towards the relevant subject matter.

orchestral.label: Orchestral
orchestral.description: Written for and performed by large orchestras.

pacifism.label: Pacifism
pacifism.description: Opposition to violence and/or war and belief in peaceful conflict resolution.

paranoia.label: Paranoia
paranoia.description: Thoughts and feelings of distrust toward others accompanied by persecutory beliefs (thinking that something or someone is out to get oneself), sometimes to the point of irrationality and delusion.

paranormal.label: Paranormal
paranormal.description: Strange events and powers that are beyond normal scientific understanding and involve unusual, unknown forces.

parenthood.label: Parenthood
parenthood.description: Life role in which one is responsible for fulfilling the needs and ensuring the upbringing of a child.

parody.label: Parody
parody.description: Takes elements from established artists, styles, or individual songs and restructures their content lyrically, musically, or by satirizing their intent to create an intentionally humorous or ironic adaptation of the original work(s).

party.label: Party
party.description: Partying; energetic jams, slow late-nighters, or something in-between.

pastiche.label: Pastiche
pastiche.description: Deliberate stylistic imitation of another artist, composer, genre, school, or period; may be neutral, without the intent to criticise or ridicule, unlike parody.

pastoral.label: Pastoral
pastoral.description: Countryside and rural life, such as open fields, rolling hills, farms, and villages.

patriotic.label: Patriotic
patriotic.description: Patriotism and/or a sense of pride towards one's country or nation.

philosophical.label: Philosophical
philosophical.description: Principles of reality, existence, knowledge, and/or values.

pitched-down vocals.label: Pitched-Down Vocals
pitched-down vocals.description: Digitally lowered vocal recordings that sound deep, ominous, or bassy.

pitched-up vocals.label: Pitched-Up Vocals
pitched-up vocals.description: Digitally raised vocal recordings that sound robotic, alien, or exaggerated.

poetic.label: Poetic
poetic.description: Generally charming; characterized by beauty; often rhymes or utilizes other rules found in styles of poetry.

police.label: Police
police.description: About civilian government bodies charged with enforcing the law and empowered to use force to ensure public order as well as protest against those groups.

political.label: Political
political.description: Political themes relate to issues within politics, and can include subjects such as nationalism, feelings towards a political leader or party, or anarchism.

polyphonic.label: Polyphonic
polyphonic.description: Utilizes multiple simultaneous parts or voices in its composition through a texture consisting of independent melodic lines, each of similar importance.

poverty.label: Poverty
poverty.description: Status of lacking sufficient money or resources to meet basic needs.

prison.label: Prison
prison.description: Institution for confinement of those convicted of serious crimes.

progressive.label: Progressive
progressive.description: Innovates musical conventions using unusual, complex structures and newer derivative styles.

protest.label: Protest
protest.description: Generally made within political activist groups in an attempt to promote social change or express concern about political issues.

provocative.label: Provocative
provocative.description: Seeks to create reactions of anger, discomfort, and/or sensationalist intrigue in the listener, typically through blunt discussion of taboo subjects.

psychedelic.label: Psychedelic
psychedelic.description: Replicates the experience of psychedelic drugs through use of techniques such as reverb, delay, and phasing as well as instruments such as distorted electric guitars.

punchy.label: Punchy
punchy.description: Fast and intense rhythmic attacks, usually with a heavy focus on percussion.

quirky.label: Quirky
quirky.description: Unusual or unexpected in nature; characterized by a playful or eccentric quality.

radio.label: Radio
radio.description: System that wirelessly broadcasts sound via electromagnetic waves or the Internet as well as the stations and programs that produce this sound.

regret.label: Regret
regret.description: Dwelling on past mistakes, negative situations, and missed opportunities in one's life and reminiscing about how things could have been done differently.

religious.label: Religious
religious.description: Drawn from religious texts or systems of beliefs or praising one's chosen deity.

remix.label: Remix
remix.description: A modified version of an existing song, typically with altered instrumentation, tempo, or arrangement.

repetitive.label: Repetitive
repetitive.description: Repetition in at least one part of its song structure, such as a repeated loop, riff, melody, hook, or singular note.

revolution.label: Revolution
revolution.description: Rapid change in political system brought about by a mass movement.

rhythmic.label: Rhythmic
rhythmic.description: Emphasizes rhythm over other aspects of composition.

rubato.label: Rubato
rubato.description: Minor variation in tempo while retaining the same pace overall to create a natural, expressive sound.

sampling.label: Sampling
sampling.description: Production technique in which an artist or band lifts a portion of a pre-existing sound recording and reuses it in a new piece.

sarcastic.label: Sarcastic
sarcastic.description: Uses irony to mock the relevant subject matter.

satirical.label: Satirical
satirical.description: Uses irony or exaggeration to ridicule human vices and follies.

scat singing.label: Scat Singing
scat singing.description: Vocal improvisation style in which singers use nonsensical syllables to mimic instrumental solos.

school.label: School
school.description: Institutions of teaching and learning and educational experiences there.

science fiction.label: Science Fiction
science fiction.description: Speculative and imaginative narratives about futuristic science and technology, such as time and advanced space travel, and paranormal subject matter.

self-hatred.label: Self-Hatred
self-hatred.description: Dislike, hatred, anger, or prejudice towards oneself and/or a group to which one belongs.

self-love.label: Self-Love
self-love.description: Having a reasonable appreciation for one's own worth and appropriately maintaining one's own well-being while avoiding the excesses of conceitedness, selfishness, and narcissism.

sensual.label: Sensual
sensual.description: Gratification or indulgence of the senses, especially sexual.

shopping.label: Shopping
shopping.description: Browsing and purchasing goods and services.

sing-rapping.label: Sing-Rapping
sing-rapping.description: Vocals blending rap with melodic elements.

sleep.label: Sleep
sleep.description: Periodic activity of rest accompanied by loss of consciousness that is essential to bodily recovery.

smooth.label: Smooth
smooth.description: Highly polished, sleek, and harmonious, often with flowing, connected notes.

socialism.label: Socialism
socialism.description: Advocates for public ownership of the means of production, generally with the goal of a classless and egalitarian society.

soft.label: Soft
soft.description: Light and/or gentle, usually resulting in a comforting or subdued style.

space.label: Space
space.description: Outer space, including universe exploration, the dark void, intergalactic wars, and alien planets.

sparse.label: Sparse
sparse.description: Utilizes significant periods of silence and/or near-silence.

spiritual.label: Spiritual
spiritual.description: Spirituality, the feelings accompanying a search for a higher plane of being, or a state of bliss found through intense [Descriptor38716] activity.

spring.label: Spring
spring.description: Imagery of spring, including blooming flowers and foliage, warming temperatures, and associated celebrations.

squelchy.label: Squelchy
squelchy.description: Resembles the sucking sounds of walking on soft, wet ground.

stomping.label: Stomping
stomping.description: Prominent and powerful percussion that resembles the sound of stomping feet.

storm.label: Storm
storm.description: Evokes imagery of torrential rain, heavy snowfall, howling winds, dark clouds and rolling thunder.

stream of consciousness.label: Stream of Consciousness
stream of consciousness.description: Narrative mode that emphasizes nonlinear, disjointed storytelling; meant to resemble the 'stream' of thoughts entering the human mind.

suburban.label: Suburban
suburban.description: Pertaining to outlying areas surrounding the city center or inner city, especially life in those residential areas or bedroom communities.

suicide.label: Suicide
suicide.description: References the act of killing oneself, including the desire or intent to do so.

suite.label: Suite
suite.description: Consists of multiple distinct (but linked) movements or pieces which are played in succession.

summer.label: Summer
summer.description: Imagery such as warm days, beaches, summer holidays and celebrations.

surreal.label: Surreal
surreal.description: Music which evokes surreal, disorienting, fantastic, or unreal imagery which often mimics the hallucinatory qualities of a dream or the ethereal.

suspenseful.label: Suspenseful
suspenseful.description: Uncertainty or excitement; the anticipation or build-up of a certain outcome.

talk-singing.label: Talk-Singing
talk-singing.description: Vocals emphasizing speech-like sounds over melody.

technical.label: Technical
technical.description: Expert display of instrumental or vocal skills by the performers, often through the use of difficult techniques, complex and varied compositions, fast tempo, and uncommon time signatures.

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: The application of scientific and conceptual knowledge for practical use, especially the tools that emerge from such efforts.

theatrical.label: Theatrical
theatrical.description: Extravagant presentation that is overly dramatic or highly emotional, often seeming staged or contrived and incorporating elements from musical theater.

through-composed.label: Through-Composed
through-composed.description: Continuous approach to musical structure in which sections are never repeated.

time.label: Time
time.description: Centered on the passage or conceptualization of a continuum of events and their duration.

trains.label: Trains
trains.description: Connected series of railroad vehicles that transport people and goods.

transgender.label: Transgender
transgender.description: Discussion of transgender people's experiences related to their gender identity as well as social commentary on transgender issues.

trauma.label: Trauma
trauma.description: Psychological injury caused by an extremely distressing experience.

travel.label: Travel
travel.description: Journeys to another place and the emotions associated with trips.

tribal.label: Tribal
tribal.description: Reflects influence of tribal cultures, relying on rhythmic structures and frequently incorporates non-Western traditional instruments.

triple metre.label: Triple Metre
triple metre.description: Time signature that divides the measure into three equal subdivisions (e.g., 3/4, 3/8, 9/8, etc.).

tropical.label: Tropical
tropical.description: Evokes the tropics, a region often associated with beaches, lush vegetation, and exotic wildlife.

twinkling.label: Twinkling
twinkling.description: Shining, with small, intermittent gleams of light.

uncommon time signatures.label: Uncommon Time Signatures
uncommon time signatures.description: Incorporates nonstandard metric groupings, often expressed with time signatures like 5/4, 7/4, 7/8, etc.

urban.label: Urban
urban.description: Imagery of a city, especially the lives of urban communities or individual people within a metropolis.

vampires.label: Vampires
vampires.description: Mythical creatures that feed on the life essence of the living, often depicted as blood-drinking undead.

vehicles.label: Vehicles
vehicles.description: Machines used for transportation, including cars, bikes, planes, and boats, among others.

video games.label: Video Games
video games.description: Games played on electronic devices, typically a gaming console or personal computer.

violence.label: Violence
violence.description: Threats or depictions of performing violent acts to another.

vocal chops.label: Vocal Chops
vocal chops.description: Uses vocal samples that are cleanly cut and usually rearranged or repeated to create new melodies and rhythms.

vocal group.label: Vocal Group
vocal group.description: Three or more vocalists performing harmonized music in a combined ensemble.

vulgar.label: Vulgar
vulgar.description: Reflects the singer's lack of good taste or politeness in regards to a (usually taboo) subject matter.

wall of sound.label: Wall of Sound
wall of sound.description: Production formula developed by producer-songwriter Phil Spector in the 1960s involving many acoustic/electric guitars, keyboards, and percussive instruments playing in unison.

war.label: War
war.description: State of armed conflict between different nations or states, or between different groups within a nation or state.

warm.label: Warm
warm.description: Warmth and associated areas, such as the desert or tropical places.

whistling.label: Whistling
whistling.description: Using breath to sing or speak without vocal cord vibration.

Wild West.label: Wild West
Wild West.description: Centered on the history and mythology of the lawlessness of the Western American frontier from the early 17th century to the early 20th century.

winter.label: Winter
winter.description: Imagery of winter, such as snow, the cold, fireplaces, and winter holidays and celebrations.

womanhood.label: Womanhood
womanhood.description: Women's experiences of their gender identity and/or sex.

wordplay.label: Wordplay
wordplay.description: Word manipulation and meaning-based language tricks.

work.label: Work
work.description: Activity involving labor to maintain livelihood and/or fulfill a role.

yarling.label: Yarling
yarling.description: Deep, guttural singing style with affected pronunciation; commonly used by male Grunge and Post-Grunge singers from the 1990s to the early 2000s.
